log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Human — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Human — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 13 damage. Human — Armored Escapist HP: 46/59
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
--- Human — Armored Escapist --- HP: 46/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
